subject: Annapolis Library Volunteer News — January 2026
body: Winter tutoring schedule, the new large-print shelf, and a thank-you to our GED volunteers.

subject: Annapolis Library Volunteer News — February 2026
body: Sign up for Thursday GED tutoring shifts and RSVP for the local-history author talk.

subject: Annapolis Library Volunteer News — March 2026
body: Spring reading challenge kickoff, birding-club meetup notes, and volunteer of the month.

subject: Annapolis Library Volunteer News — April 2026
body: National Library Week events, the plant swap on the seawall lawn, and new tutoring materials.

subject: Annapolis Library Volunteer News — May 2026
body: Old Fox Books used-book drive, summer reading prep, and a call for weekend shelvers.

subject: Annapolis Library Volunteer News — October 2026
body: Summer reading program launch, extended October hours, and the volunteer appreciation picnic.

subject: Summer Reading Program — Registration Now Open
body: Register children and adults for the summer reading program and pick up your tracking sheet at the desk.

subject: Author Talk Reminder — Chesapeake History Night
body: A reminder that the Chesapeake history author talk is this Thursday at 6:30 PM in the community room.

subject: Family Story Time and Reading-Pact Picks
body: This month's family story time schedule and staff picks for young readers working through a reading pact.

subject: Volunteer Shift Confirmations — Week of October 29
body: Your Thursday tutoring shift is confirmed. Reply if you need to swap with another volunteer.

subject: New This Month at the Annapolis Library
body: New arrivals, the environmental-policy lecture series, and updated large-print and audiobook shelves.

subject: November Hours and Holiday Closure Notice
body: Independence Day closure details and the November tutoring and program calendar are attached.
